cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out if the sentence "John Brown went for it on fourth down in the NFC championship." is plausible. Let's break it down and think through the possible issues. The NFC Championship Game is the conference championship game of the NFC and is played once each year to determine the champion of the NFC, who then proceeds to the Super Bowl.
